_instructions.enabled: Set to true to enable monitoring. MUST be enabled manually after setup.
_instructions.checkInterval: How often to check for new commits (in minutes). Used for cron scheduling.
_instructions.autoApply: WARNING: If true, will attempt to automatically apply changes. Keep false for safety.
_instructions.notifyTelegram: If true, send notifications when new commits are detected
_instructions.lastChecked: Automatically updated. Last time the monitor ran.
